title: Install, Scope, Package, and Govern Skills · MCP Build Room
summary: Move a proven local skill into a team-distributed package. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a distributable skill plugin while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose repository, user, admin, or system scope according to ownership and audience.
Inspect source, scripts, dependencies, and permissions before installing a skill.
Package skills and related extension assets in a valid plugin manifest.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:

steps.title: Extend the cumulative artifact
steps.instruction: Append a agent-ext-governance-1g92ay: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.

content.code:
agent-ext-governance-1g92ay:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
